name: freecad-automation
description: FreeCAD-backed automation pipeline for CAD, drawings, inspection, FEM, reports, and manufacturing-review artifacts

scripts.test:node:lite: node tests/config-normalizer.test.js && npm run test:node:runtime && node tests/draw-pipeline-qa-config.test.js && node tests/report-fem-normalization.test.js && node tests/report-runtime-fallback.test.js && node tests/design-reviewer-validation.test.js
scripts.test:py: python3 -c "import sys; sys.exit('Python 3.11+ is required for npm run test:py' if sys.version_info < (3, 11) else 0)" && python3 -m pytest -q
